_doc: KuCoin 4h factor-research universe. Built by tools/build_kucoin_universe.py. Config schema mirrors strategy.json / kucoin.json conventions.

universe.name: KUCOIN_TOP30_4h
universe._top_n_note: Per H1 sweep — TOP30 best on TRAIN, TOP20 best on V+T. TOP30 chosen as default for thicker cross-section.
universe._rebalance_note: Per H3+R1 sweep — 60d optimal at TOP30 (regime-commitment unlocks alpha; daily rebalance churns and breaks position continuity).
universe._min_history_note: Per H2 sweep — 365d sweet spot. <90d contaminates with post-listing pumps; >540d shrinks universe too small.

exclusion._method_note: Per R2 — vol-rank-95 exclusion (top 5% by historical Parkinson_60 vol over TRAIN window) beats name-pattern meme exclusion.

weighting._weighting_note: Per R3 — equal-weight beats ADV-weighted by 0.05-0.10 SR consistently across sizes.
